message:
perf(mvcc): SireadTable-empty short-circuit + identity-hashed committed SSI indexes

Two related levers on the SSI edge-discovery path:

1. Short-circuit `ActiveEdgeDiscoveryIndex::{incoming,outgoing}_candidate_refs`
   and `collect_precise_candidates` when the active view-set contains no
   reader/writer with witnesses at all (`self.all_readers.is_empty()` /
   `self.all_writers.is_empty()` / all committed-history indexes empty).
   On a write-only MT workload a committer was previously cloning
   `readers_with_global_keys`, probing `readers_by_page` once per written
   page, then running sort+dedup — all producing an empty candidate
   list. This is the SireadTable-equivalent "no one read anything"
   short-circuit.

2. Swap the four `HashMap<PageNumber, Vec<usize>>` indexes on
   `ConcurrentRegistry` (committed_readers_by_page,
   committed_readers_by_page_witness, committed_writers_by_page,
   committed_writers_by_page_witness) from the default `RandomState`
   hasher to the identity-hashed `PageMap<Vec<usize>>`, matching the
   fix landed in 40c64b53 for `ActiveEdgeDiscoveryIndex`. Update
   `collect_precise_candidates` signature to take `PageMap` refs.

Before: 10.7 ns/call (median; ±2% variance; n=7 trials, 500k calls/trial)
After:  9.7 ns/call  (median; ±2.6% variance; n=7 trials, 500k calls/trial)
Delta:  -9.3% per `incoming_candidate_refs` call on the write-only shape
        (16 writer views × 10 pages, committer writes 10 pages, zero
        readers — the short-circuit fires on every call)
Bench:  bench_incoming_candidate_refs_empty_readers (added here)
Cmd:    rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_cc4_mvcc \
        cargo test -p fsqlite-mvcc --lib --release \
        bench_incoming_candidate_refs_empty_readers -- --ignored --nocapture

The registry-side hasher swap is a parallel improvement whose delta was
already proven by the 40c64b53 microbench on the active-index variant
(-30.2% on the analogous `build` path); this lands it for the
committed-history indexes that `collect_precise_candidates` consults on
every commit. No separate microbench added for it to avoid duplicating
the proof surface.

Correctness: 112 begin_concurrent + ssi_validation tests pass, including
test_write_skew_prevented, test_t3_rule_committed_pivot_forces_abort,
test_ssi_pivot_abort, and the full SSI anomaly suite.

Bead: bd-m18fy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
